creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2011-03-17 15:47:15 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    audio/libofa         Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
  Added files:
    audio/libofa/files   patch-lib__JAMA__tnt_math_utils.h 
  Removed files:
    audio/libofa/files   patch-examples_examples.cpp 
                         patch-examples_uselame.cpp 
                         patch-examples_wavefile.cpp 
                         patch-lib_JAMA_tnt__math_utils.h 
  Log:
  - Update MASTER_SITES
  - Add LICENSE (GPLv2)
  - Mark MAKE_JOBS_SAFE
  - Remove ^M in files with USE_DOS2UNIX
  - Use gnomehack to fix pkgconfig directory
  - Remove MD5
  - Remove 4.x patches
  - Bump port revision since installed header file contains ^M
  - Update pkg-descr
  - Take maintainership
  
  PR:             155608
  Submitted by:   Jason E. Hale <bsdkaffee@gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.17      +10 -10    ports/audio/libofa/Makefile
  1.3       +0 -1      ports/audio/libofa/distinfo
  1.2       +0 -11     ports/audio/libofa/files/patch-examples_examples.cpp (dead)
  1.2       +0 -11     ports/audio/libofa/files/patch-examples_uselame.cpp (dead)
  1.2       +0 -10     ports/audio/libofa/files/patch-examples_wavefile.cpp (dead)
  1.2       +0 -33     ports/audio/libofa/files/patch-lib_JAMA_tnt__math_utils.h (dead)
  1.1       +33 -0     ports/audio/libofa/files/patch-lib__JAMA__tnt_math_utils.h (new)
  1.2       +4 -3      ports/audio/libofa/pkg-descr
